FROM orders
JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id
JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id
WHERE products.category = 'Electronics'

GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
WHERE r.refund_amount > 0.1 * oi.line_total
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING COUNT(r.id) > 10

nl_prompt: What is the average order value per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, AVG(o.line_value) AS average_order_value

nl_prompt: What is the revenue from completed orders versus pending orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN o.status = 'Completed' THEN SUM(o.line_value)
        ELSE 0
    END AS completed_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN o.status = 'Pending' THEN SUM(o.line_value)
        ELSE 0
    END AS pending_revenue
FROM 
    orders o
GROUP BY 
    o.status

nl_prompt: Which product has the highest total quantity sold?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.name, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the total discount given across all orders?
generated_sql:

nl_prompt: What is the average number of items per order by category?
generated_sql:

GROUP BY p.category

nl_prompt: What percentage of revenue comes from our top 20 percent of customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN c.segment IN (SELECT segment FROM customers ORDER BY line_value DESC LIMIT 20) THEN o.line_value ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(o.line_value) AS top_20_percent_revenue_percentage
FROM 
    orders o
JOIN 
    customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id

WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'

nl_prompt: What is the on-time delivery rate by CRM deal stage?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    s.stage,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.delivery_date <= ld.expected_date THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS on_time_deliveries,
    COUNT(*) AS total_deliveries,
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.delivery_date <= ld.expected_date THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS on_time_rate
FROM 
    sales_reps s
JOIN 
    logistics_deliveries ld ON s.id = ld.sales_rep_id
GROUP BY 
    s.stage

nl_prompt: Which logistics carrier has the worst on-time rate for top revenue customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT l.carrier_name, AVG(CASE WHEN o.line_value > (SELECT AVG(line_value) FROM orders) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_rate
FROM logistics_deliveries l
JOIN orders o ON l.tracking_id = o.shipping_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.segment = 'Top Revenue'
GROUP BY l.carrier_name
ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, COUNT(ld.tracking_id) AS complaint_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.tracking_id
WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled' OR o.status = 'Failed'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC
LIMIT 10

generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, AVG(r.sentiment_score) AS average_sentiment
FROM products p
JOIN reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY average_sentiment DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What common complaints appear for delayed shipments?
generated_sql:
SELECT reason
FROM returns
WHERE order_id IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM orders
    WHERE status = 'Delayed'
)

nl_prompt: Find customers who mentioned competitors in support.
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%competitors%'

nl_prompt: What were top 3 reasons for returns?
generated_sql:
SELECT reason, COUNT(*) AS return_count
FROM returns
GROUP BY reason
ORDER BY return_count DESC
LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?
generated_sql:
SELECT s.rep_name
FROM sales_reps s
JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.segment = 'Positive Feedback'
GROUP BY s.rep_name
ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.segment AS segment,
    COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
    SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(o.ship_date - o.order_date) AS avg_delivery_time
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE 
    c.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY 
    c.segment

nl_prompt: Which logistics partners have most damaged goods complaints?
generated_sql:
SELECT carrier_name, COUNT(*) AS complaint_count
FROM logistics_deliveries
WHERE status_code = 100
GROUP BY carrier_name
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What do churned customers say were top reasons for leaving?
generated_sql:
SELECT reason FROM returns
JOIN orders ON returns.order_id = orders.id
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id
WHERE customers.segment = 'Churned'

nl_prompt: Find orders where complaints mention product defects.
generated_sql:
SELECT o.id
FROM orders o
JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
WHERE r.reason LIKE '%product defects%'
